title: Plugins
notice: This page currently focuses on two things: installing plugins and surfacing MCP-capable plugins. Broader plugin management can come later.

pencil.title: Connect Pencil to Claude/Codex MCP from here
pencil.description: Copy the MCP configuration from Pencil settings, then paste it into this project's .mcp.json (or your ~/.claude/settings.json).
pencil.hint: Pencil exposes an MCP server config. OpenClaw plugins in this page are a separate mechanism.
pencil.templateTitle: Template (replace placeholders with the real command / args copied from Pencil)

catalog.title: Plugin Install
catalog.description: Browse the OpenClaw plugins currently supported by MimiClaw and install them directly.

mcp.title: MCP Plugins
mcp.description: Quickly review plugins that expose MCP capabilities.
